src: Backend.AI Web UI for web / desktop app (Windows/Linux/macOS). Backend.AI Web UI provides a convenient environment for users, while allowing various commands to be executed without CLI. It also provides some visual features that are not provided by the CLI, such as dashboards and statistics.
ja: Web／デスクトップアプリ（Windows/Linux/macOS）向けBackend.AI Web UI。CLIなしで各種コマンドを実行できる便利な環境を提供し、ダッシュボードや統計などCLIにはないビジュアル機能も備える
